Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I thought... we were all searching for the same thing...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}I thought we all cared about each other... So why...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}The next battle will be the last.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}If we win, there won't be anyone left who can take your key.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}I think I agree with Junpei-san. That we're the problem...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}And knowing that I might die because of all this... It's terrifying...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Terrifying to think that conflict is inevitable because agreeing with anyone means disagreeing with someone else...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}So do we really have no choice but to hurt the ones we care about the most...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}That's just... I don't think I can take it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}I can't do this. I won't. I'm not fighting anymore.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}I'll give Yukari-san and Mitsuru-san my key, and this will be over.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 8 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}No! You can't just let yourself die![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}If I did, then that would be fine...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Besides, you still don't know that for certain. I should be okay if my power core remains functional.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}I get... that I haven't shared much about myself. But I wasn't trying to hide something.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}I just... really don't know anything...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}I'm not sure when I discovered my emotions because I don't have any memories...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}I just woke up here, alone, and I only knew two things...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}One was that I had a sister somewhere out there who would understand me...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}And the other... was that, if I didn't do something, she would die.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}At first, I thought it would be because of the Abyss of Time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}But I don't think so anymore. Now I think...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 8 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}It's that power you awakened to. A power that leads to its wielder's death...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 10 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}I went to find you so I could save you, but I ended up causing your power to awaken...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}That's why... I would do anything to protect you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}Even if it means you'll hate me for it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}I felt the same way about someone once...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}But... That's exactly why I won't fight anymore. I can't hurt the people who made me who I am...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}Even if you're right and it ends up leading to my death.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}Why do you have to die? Why does it have to be you...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}Please don't leave me behind... I'll give my life for the key too![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}And if that doesn't work... then I'm coming with you! So we can always be together...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 64 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}Please, don't leave me all alone![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 51 0 0}I'm sorry. Don't worry, I'm not going anywhere.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 52 0 0}I know how painful it is... to be left behind like that...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 55 0 0}You always seem to remind me of the things that are most important...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 57 0 0}Feelings for others can be painful, and even make us hurt each other...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 58 0 0}Honestly, they can cause a lot of suffering.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 59 0 0}But if I try to avoid that by not making a choice... I'd just be passing it off to someone else.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 61 0 0}I think I finally understand what Yukari-san was saying before.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 62 0 0}Now everyone needs to recognize their own feelings.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 63 0 0}Think about who he was and what he meant to us...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 64 0 0}I was... running away from how I feel.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 0 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 66 0 0}If fixing or letting go of the past isn't the right way to think about it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 0 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 67 0 0}Fuuka-san, I want to discuss something with you.[n]{f 1 1}
